features: Polished Client Dashboard Recent Reports card layout in the right rail
Fixed recent report cards being affected by the full Client Reports table row styles
Replaced raw Request # identifiers with clean client-facing report titles such as property Patrol Report
Moved report/request reference into a small muted reference line instead of using it as the main title
Improved property name, address, proof count, and published timestamp spacing
Added line clamping and wrapping so long addresses no longer crush the card layout
Reduced excessive Recent Reports card bottom padding
Preserved v3.0.75 job timeline / audit trail
Preserved v3.0.74 global dashboard/report/proof logic sync
